title: Arduino Snake Robot Controlled via Android Application
description: 8-segment snake robot with MG996R servo joints driven by Arduino Mega, receiving gait parameters (amplitude, period, phase) wirelessly from an Android Bluetooth app.
objective: Achieve lateral undulation gait on flat floor; Android app controls speed and gait pattern; 8 servo joints, 1 m total length.
constraints: 6 V servo supply; HC-05 BT range ≥ 10 m; total BOM < ₹3000; powered by 2S LiPo.
supporting_fact_titles: Android Bluetooth SPP to Arduino Serial Bridge

element_usage_notes.Snake Robot Multi-Servo Joint Chain: 7 MG996R servos; 8 ABS link bodies 50 mm each; alternating H/V joint plane.
element_usage_notes.HC-05 Bluetooth Serial Bridge: Pairs with Android MIT App Inventor app; 9600 baud; sends (A, T, φ) ASCII packet.
